oneLiner: See recent payments, generate Stripe checkout links, and send invoices through your connected Stripe account.

tools.name: stripe_get_recent_payments
tools.summary: List the user's most-recent successful charges on Stripe.

tools.name: stripe_create_payment_link
tools.summary: Generate a hosted Stripe checkout link the user can share with a customer.

amount.description: Major-currency amount (e.g., 19.99 for $19.99). Converted to minor units before sending to Stripe.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, INR, EUR).

tools.name: stripe_send_invoice
tools.summary: MONEY TOOL — create and finalize an invoice that will charge the listed customer. Two-step confirmation via simulate flag.
